data.title: Multi-layered Authentication
data.description: Complex authentication processes to protect user data.
data.technical_spec: Incorporates two-factor authentication (2FA) and OAuth for secure user credential verification.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Regular audits and vulnerability assessments to identify and mitigate security risks.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes automated scanning tools and manual testing to ensure compliance with the latest security protocols.

data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: User data is encrypted both at rest and in transit.
data.technical_spec: Adopts standard encryption protocols like TLS for data in transit and AES for data stored in databases.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Protection against Distributed Denial of Service attacks to maintain website uptime.
data.technical_spec: Employs traffic monitoring and automated filtering to absorb, redirect, and mitigate attack impacts.

data.title: Access Control Policies
data.description: Strict access control measures to safeguard sensitive information.
data.technical_spec: Role-based access control (RBAC) is enforced, limiting data access based on user roles.
